title: Sphere
description: Sphere: Standard sphere defining the closed bounding surface of constant distance from a point, its Centre

Centre.description: Origin point defining location of the Sphere in three-dimensional space Point: Defines a dimensionless location in three-dimensional space.

Radius.description: Distance from the Centre to the Sphere boundary surface Property has a quantity of type Length measured in [m].

_bhomVersion.description: Optional version of BHoM used as part of automatic versioning and schema upgrades.
